ip_outcome_note: Card explicitly named 'Ares - God of War' with Storyborn/Deity classification under the Hercules franchise. Art matches Disney's Ares (stocky red-armored deity with plumed helmet, sword and shield). Confirmed via card name, franchise attribution, and Lorcana database entries. No prior Ares printing exists in Lorcana before Set 10.

trivia_bullets.text: Ares debuts in Whispers in the Well (Set 10, November 2025), Lorcana's mystery/noir set. The Hercules franchise appeared since Set 1 but Ares as a named card is a Set 10 debut.
sources: Lorcana Player: Hercules franchise card list
Lorcana Player: Ares - God of War card page

trivia_bullets.text: Reckless forces challenges every turn; CALL TO BATTLE enables readying a character whenever a card is placed under a character or location, tying him to Set 10's Boost mechanic. Artist: Kiersten Hale.
sources: Lorcana Player: Ares - God of War 104/204

trivia_bullets.text: In Disney's Hercules (1997), Ares has a minor film cameo; his expanded role is in the animated TV series (1998-1999) as a recurring antagonist voiced by Jay Thomas, championing Sparta over Athens.
sources: Wikipedia: List of Disney's Hercules characters

trivia_bullets.text: 2 ink cost, 3 Strength / 3 Willpower, Reckless. Pure aggressive attacker for Ruby builds, cannot quest, must challenge, enables CALL TO BATTLE combo readying.
sources: WebSearch snippet via Red Claw Gaming / Troll and Toad product listings
